task_objective: Implement a Notifications panel with a global all-notifications toggle and granular notification category controls above the Ludusavi panel.
design_decisions: Persist notification preferences inside the existing settings payload so legacy state defaults all notification categories to enabled.
Expose a single Notifications panel between Sync and Ludusavi with All Notifications first and granular ToggleField controls disabled when the global toggle is off.
Route all Decky toasts through a notification-aware frontend helper while preserving frontend-owned lifecycle handling.
results: Implemented backend persistence and RPC support, frontend notification preference controls, centralized toast gating, documentation updates, and regression tests.
